error-csa-goodmatch-limit: The value of CSA Thresholds 'Good Match' must be less than 100 and greater than 0.
error-csa-goodmatch-format: The value of CSA Thresholds 'Good Match' was not correct format.
error-csa-notmatch-max: The value of CSA Thresholds 'Not Match' must be less than CSA Thresholds 'Undetermined'.

error-csa-notmatch-format: The value of CSA Thresholds 'Not Match' was not correct format.
error-csa-undetermined-min: The value of CSA Thresholds 'Undetermined' must be greater than CSA Thresholds 'Not Match'.
error-csa-undetermined-max: The value of CSA Thresholds 'Undetermined' must be less than CSA Thresholds 'Good Match'.
error-csa-undetermined-format: The value of CSA Thresholds 'Undetermined' was not correct format.
